calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Competence-localization diagnostic (all-ON forage): OFAT over P1-budget / frozen-encoder / mechanism-interference vs a greedy-oracle positive control
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC (experiment_purpose=diagnostic, claim_ids=[], non_contributory, PROMOTES NOTHING). Localizes WHY the integrated all-ON REE-v3 agent foraged 0.065/0.0/0.455 resources/ep (below 1.0 floor, 0/3 seeds) in failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-719a_2026-07-08 -- shared root of the 654h/485i/625e/460h/460i substrate_not_ready retest wall. OFAT: baseline A0 (719a all-ON P1=90 frozen) + single-factor arms A1 (P1=300, thin-budget), A2 (encoder unfrozen in P1), A3 (minimal forage-only config, mechanism-interference), + A4 recovery ceiling (minimal+P1=300+unfrozen). Greedy nearest-resource oracle positive control validates the 1.0 floor is achievable in-env. Self-route readiness/present(competence_lever_localized)/diffuse -- HYPOTHESIS not verdict; route to /failure-autopsy. BRAKE-EXEMPT: different question than ARC-062/MECH-309 (why incompetent, not committed-action collapse); tags NO claim. Feeds /implement-substrate f_dominance_conversion_ceiling competence/training-regime build. arm_cell self-mints per-cell fingerprints (no separate baseline mint: bespoke diagnostic arm configs, no lineage family expected).

items.title: MECH-268 dACC conflict-saturation LIVE-LOOP falsifier (ecological analogue of 463b)
items.note: Ecological (live-loop) analogue of V3-EXQ-463b. 463b validated MECH-268 f_sat ONLY via manual per-step record_outcome injection (synthetic). This run makes NO manual record_outcome call and proves the DACC _outcome_history FIFO is filled by the LIVE agent.py select_action tail (F-C3 wiring, ree-v3 main c7fc045, 2026-07-09) via a counting spy; chronic-harm env (num_hazards=6) keeps z_harm_a supra-threshold so the recurring harm class saturates. ARM_ON final-third sat_factor<0.95 vs ARM_OFF ~1.0 (OFF also has zero live record calls -- gating check). CLEARS a re-derive brake: MECH-268 had 5 substrate_ceiling autopsies (SD-034-closure-cluster 2026-06-12, SD-034-closure-control-plane-d 2026-06-13, V3-EXQ-460b-461b-464b-466b 2026-06-04, V3-EXQ-468e 2026-06-18, V3-EXQ-468f 2026-06-20) all PREDATING the c7fc045 live-path wiring this experiment is the first to exercise ecologically -- brake RELEASED per queue-experiment Step 2.5b (upstream substrate now BUILT). ARM_OFF is minted reuse-eligible (arm_cell, include_driver_script_in_hash=False; reuse assumes a cloud linux-x86_64-py3.10 claim). PROMOTES NOTHING -- closes the 'validated only via synthetic injection' gap (design_implementation_audit_2026-07-09.md sec 6, MECH-268 gov follow-up #2).

items.title: Coherence non-reducibility retest on the REPAIRED (converging) learned cross-stream binder (hard convergence gate)
items.note: GATED retest routed by failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-725_2026-07-09 + /implement-substrate (cross_stream_binding convergence repair, ree-v3 b86fa3e). 725 ran the learned binder but it NEVER CONVERGED -- InfoNCE loss at chance log(64)=4.16 (observed 3.75-3.96) because the observed (z_self,z_world) latents are near-collinear buffer-wide (cos ~0.99) and the un-normalized dot-product logit is magnitude-dominated; SPEC regressed 3/6 (720 fixed field) -> 0/6, an UNTRAINED-substrate artifact (NOT a coherence verdict; the 720 learned-binder hypothesis stayed UNTESTED). Repair = L2-normalize phi_self/phi_world (cosine InfoNCE, SimCLR-standard) -> loss 0.65-0.80 of chance; substrate now exposes binder_converged=loss_ema<conv_frac*log(batch). This retest: (1) cross_stream_binding_temperature=0.2 (725 used default 0.5; 0.2 deepens the margin); (2) HARD learned_binder_converged precondition (every primary seed's loss_ema < 0.85*log(batch)) REPLACING 725's vacuous learned_binder_trained (n_learn_steps>1) check -- an unconverged binder self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue (-> /failure-autopsy, an environment-adequacy question), NEVER a coherence verdict. PASS gate unchanged: >=4/6 SPEC AND n_rebind>0. binder_converged=True already smoke-confirmed on the real 725 latent stream (loss_ema 3.33 < gate 3.54 at default temp; 0.2 deepens it) and the gate unit-tested both ways (converged->register path; unconverged->not_ready even with SPEC 6/6). diagnostic, claim_ids=[] (bears on INV-002/MECH-089/MECH-270/MECH-269). Both 2026-04-23 intakes (binding + path_integral) stay OPEN, gated on this run. REFUSED sibling: a naive 725b rerunning the same non-converging curriculum. PROMOTES NOTHING.

items.title: Trained all-ON capability point (WS-3): 4-metric yardstick on the 724 A0-trained all-ON stack vs 727 floor/ceiling scale
items.note: BASELINE (experiment_purpose=baseline, claim_ids=[], non_contributory, PROMOTES NOTHING; EXCLUDED from governance scoring). WS-3 of ree_ai_design_critique_plan.md OWED next step: lands the TRAINED all-ON stack on ALL FOUR capability_eval metrics (foraging_competence / survival_horizon / goal_reach_rate / planning_depth) against the V3-EXQ-727 random-floor / greedy-oracle scale, closing the "reported alongside every all-ON run" clause. Three arms x 3 seeds: random_walk (FLOOR), ree_trained_allon (all-ON 714 ARM_ON trained with the V3-EXQ-724 A0 recipe: P0=200 world-model warmup + P1=90 two-head REINFORCE [lateral-PFC bias + OFC devaluation], SD-056 e2 encoder FROZEN through P1), greedy_oracle (CEILING; reused verbatim from 724 positive control). Eval via the yardstick REEForwardPolicy (identical path to 727 p0warmup arm -> 727-vs-728 isolates P1 competence-training effect; mechanism-agnostic, no P2 OFC-viability injection, so NOT required to reproduce 724 A0 P2 DV byte-for-byte). Self-route (HYPOTHESIS): oracle clears the 1.0 floor AND oracle>random on foraging -> trained_allon_capability_point_landed; else substrate_not_ready_requeue. Trained-point supra-floor status + normalized positions are REPORTED CONTEXT, not a governance verdict (excluded from scoring). NO baseline mint: substrate in flux for this lineage (724-A0 recipe re-tunes per iteration) + the trained all-ON point IS the denominator, not a reusable OFF arm. Dry-run PASS (oracle 3.5>random 0.0 forage/ep; trained arm P0+P1 harness runs clean; all 4 metrics normalize on the scale).

items.title: J-lens discriminative-compactness diagnostic (SD-064 Exp A; supersedes 723)
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC (experiment_purpose=diagnostic, claim_ids=[], PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING; SD-064 global-workspace + MECH-191 CONTEXT only). Alphabetic-suffix redesign of V3-EXQ-723 (same scientific question), fixing the two NON-DISCRIMINATIVE gates per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-723_2026-07-09: (1) discriminative compactness via a matched-null CONCENTRATION curve (top-influence vs random dim ordering; ratio ~1 for a diffuse map so a weak signal does NOT trivially pass -- LOAD-BEARING) + a reported matched-rank random-subspace activity contrast, replacing the trivially-cleared jspace_activity_fraction<0.10 and ~1.0-by-construction predictive_retention; (2) GATES the plan's broadcast-alignment (reportability) + reactive-bypass (H1-vs-H5) contrasts into the verdict; (3) committed-action-balanced eval (effective-class floor + class-weighted ridge + longer P2=9000 ticks) so no seed degenerates to ~2 classes (cf. 723 seed 43). Self-route is a HYPOTHESIS for /failure-autopsy. A CLEAN compact_action_coupled_subspace_present GREENLIGHTS the SD-027 Experiment-B retrofit build (plan section 5); a negative saves the build. Queue-add note: watch the phase3-queue snapshot race (post-commit dropped-file check per queue-experiment Step 8).

items.title: Q-080.a effort->harm coupling: protective disengagement + irreversibility-aware caution (diagnostic)
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC (experiment_purpose=diagnostic, claim_ids=[Q-080]). Factorial {effort_harm_coupling OFF/ON} on the effort-dissociating env; value+allostatic machinery (use_dacc + use_pacc_analog + use_aic_analog + MECH-219 use_harm_suffering_accumulator) ON in BOTH arms. Commitment probe: agent teleported into the HIGH-effort corridor; measures whether coupling ON adds protective disengagement BEFORE depletion + caution tracking the IRREVERSIBLE exertion_permanent that OFF lacks. ON-wins => harm-coupling warranted; OFF-already-disengages => effort is foregone value, do NOT mint. Readiness gate: paths differ in per-action energy cost AND exertion accrues, else substrate_not_ready_requeue. Env substrate landed 2026-07-09 (CausalGridWorld effort_dissociation_enabled; spec REE_assembly/docs/architecture/effort_dissociation_env.md; ree-v3/CLAUDE.md). Diagnostic self-route is a HYPOTHESIS for /failure-autopsy; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING (answers open_question Q-080, mints no mechanism). Queue-add: watch the phase3-queue snapshot race (post-commit dropped-file check per queue-experiment Step 8).

items.title: Q-080.b least-effort prior: tied-benefit default to low-effort path vs value-subtraction (diagnostic)
items.note: DIAGNOSTIC (experiment_purpose=diagnostic, claim_ids=[Q-080]). Factorial {least-effort prior OFF/ON} at the TIED-benefit probe (effort_benefit_asymmetry=0.0), value-subtraction term (learned per-action effort EMA) ON in both arms; plus a CONTROL_ASYM arm (asym=0.5) proving the value term is non-vacuous. Prior + value modelled as an additive bias over agent.e3 per-first-action scores (corridors equidistant => dACC length-effort is tied, only env energy differs). ON-wins => least-effort prior warranted; OFF-already-low-defaults => value term suffices, prior redundant. Navigation + tied-benefit + cost-differential readiness gates, else substrate_not_ready_requeue. Env substrate landed 2026-07-09 (CausalGridWorld effort_dissociation_enabled; spec REE_assembly/docs/architecture/effort_dissociation_env.md; ree-v3/CLAUDE.md). Diagnostic self-route is a HYPOTHESIS for /failure-autopsy; PROMOTES/DEMOTES NOTHING (answers open_question Q-080, mints no mechanism).
